summary: Tested and VERIFIED all 3 bug fixes for the thread page: (1) Backend API /api/messages/conversation/{id}/info now returns contact_id field - PASS, (2) Frontend contact name click navigates to correct contact_id instead of conversation_id - PASS, (3) Intel refresh includes window.scrollTo call for scroll-to-top - PASS (code review verified).

ui_bugs.issue: React Native Web's TouchableOpacity does not pass through data-testid attribute to rendered HTML. The attribute is in the code but not in DOM.
ui_bugs.note: This is a React Native Web limitation, not a code bug. The functionality works correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Backend line 804 correctly adds contact_id to response: result['contact_id'] = str(contact_id)
PASS: Frontend line 520 defines contactIdForNav state variable
PASS: Frontend line 536 sets contactIdForNav from API response.data.contact_id
PASS: Frontend line 1666 uses contactIdForNav || id for navigation
PASS: Frontend line 631 calls window.scrollTo({top:0, behavior:'smooth'}) in generateIntel function

success_rate.frontend: 100% (5/5 code review tests + Playwright E2E test passed)

seed_data_creation: Used existing conversation ID 69a15f29957bacd218fed55d with contact_id 69a0c06f7626f14d125f8c34 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Thread page bug fixes verified. The contact name in header now navigates to /contact/{contact_id} instead of /contact/{conversation_id}. Important: User must be logged in for the API call to work - the API call to /api/messages/conversation/{id}/info requires user session context. The scroll-to-top fix only triggers when intel is generated on web platform.

bug_2_frontend_navigation.test: Click contact name in thread header

bug_3_intel_scroll.expected: window.scrollTo({top:0, behavior:'smooth'}) called after intel generation
bug_3_intel_scroll.actual: Code at line 631 confirms scroll-to-top is implemented
